programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: While Dana is in premature labor, Ryan is in a war-torn country, delivering a celebrity's baby.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Dana and Cheryl hesitantly entrust Ryan and Jim to watch the kids and baby Tanner while they have a girls night out.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Dana and baby Tanner stay with Jim and Cheryl for a night, but the baby's crying makes it impossible for Jim to sleep.

programme.desc: Cory is caught cheating on an IQ test, thus ending his reputation as a genius.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Cory's eccentric grandmother (Rue McClanahan) pays a visit and turns the house upside down.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Mr. Feeny agrees to switch roles temporarily, allowing Cory to become a teacher.

programme.title: 700 Club Interactive
programme.desc: Highlighting current events and stories that will help bring encouragment to people.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim has big plans for Ruby when she is hired for a cookies advertisement.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl goes behind Jim's back and lends money to Andy for a down payment on a new condominium.

programme.title: Dr. Dolittle
programme.desc: After a fender bender, Dr. John Dolittle (Eddie Murphy) gets back his childhood ability to converse with animals. But the gift turns out to be a mixed blessing when the good doctor finds himself besieged by boozing monkeys, injured owls and depressed lions who need his special assistance. When Dolittle's strange behavior catches the attention of his wife, Lisa (Kristen Wilson), he winds up in a mental institution. Luckily, he has some animal friends to help him out of his hairy situation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Dr. Dolittle 2
programme.desc: In Dr. Dolittle 2, the now-famous doc has more patients -- two-legged and four-legged -- than he can handle. But his animal friends want more than office visits. The outraged critters want to save their forest from unscrupulous human developers, and they're seeking Dolittle's help.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: WALL-E
programme.desc: WALL-E, short for Waste Allocation Load Lifter Earth-class, is the last robot left on Earth. He spends his days tidying up the planet, one piece of garbage at a time. But during 700 years, WALL-E has developed a personality, and he's more than a little lonely. Then he spots EVE (Elissa Knight), a sleek and shapely probe sent back to Earth on a scanning mission. Smitten WALL-E embarks on his greatest adventure yet when he follows EVE across the galaxy.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Up
programme.desc: Carl Fredricksen, a 78-year-old balloon salesman, is about to fulfill a lifelong dream. Tying thousands of balloons to his house, he flies away to the South American wilderness. But curmudgeonly Carl's worst nightmare comes true when he discovers a little boy named Russell is a stowaway aboard the balloon-powered house.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Ratatouille
programme.desc: Remy (Patton Oswalt), a resident of Paris, appreciates good food and has quite a sophisticated palate. He would love to become a chef so he can create and enjoy culinary masterpieces to his heart's delight. The only problem is, Remy is a rat. When he winds up in the sewer beneath one of Paris' finest restaurants, the rodent gourmet finds himself ideally placed to realize his dream.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Lara Spencer challenges two teams to thrift and transform a space into a swanky speakeasy, pitting Moroccan flair against Art Deco glamour as they hunt for standout pieces and reimagine secondhand finds into dramatic, high-style designs.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Amazing stories of people who have experienced God's blessings.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim does not tell Cheryl that their health insurance has been canceled after he has an argument with a claims representative.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Coach Jim turns his daughters' noncompetitive basketball team into tough, aggressive winners.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: The Ghost of Andy gives Jim a glimpse of Kyle's future as a loser because of Jim's failed attempts to help his son during a softball game.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Andy's new metal detector uncovers Jim's long lost wedding ring, causing a problem for Jim, who's been hiding the fact that he lost it for years.

programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.desc: A friend misinterprets Cory's act of Christmas kindness as charity.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Cory and Eric invent some white lies in order to skip the annual father-son softball game.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Cory and Eric decide to play detective when they discover provocative clothing in their mother's bowling bag.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Meet ordinary people who have experienced the extraordinary power of prayer.

programme.title: 700 Club Interactive
programme.desc: Highlighting current events and stories that will help bring encouragment to people.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatians
programme.desc: Fashion designer Anita and computer-game writer Roger meet, fall in love and marry along with their Dalmatians Perdita and Pongo. The dogs' puppies are kidnapped by Anita's boss Cruella De Vil, who is stealing young Dalmatians to make the coat she has set her heart on. Pongo and Perdita set out to find and rescue all ninety-nine pups from their fearsome captors.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Maleficent
programme.desc: As a beautiful young woman of pure heart, Maleficent (Angelina Jolie) has an idyllic life in a forest kingdom. When an invading army threatens the land, Maleficent rises up to become its fiercest protector. However, a terrible betrayal hardens her heart and twists her into a creature bent on revenge. She engages in an epic battle with the invading king's successor, then curses his newborn daughter, Aurora -- realizing only later that the child holds the key to peace in the kingdom.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Maleficent: Mistress of Evil
programme.desc: Maleficent travels to a grand old castle to celebrate young Aurora's upcoming wedding to Prince Phillip. While there, she meets Aurora's future mother-in-law -- a conniving queen who hatches a devious plot to destroy the land's fairies. Hoping to stop her, Maleficent joins forces with a seasoned warrior and a group of outcasts to battle the queen and her powerful army.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cruella
programme.desc: Estella is a young and clever grifter who's determined to make a name for herself in the fashion world. She soon meets a pair of thieves who appreciate her appetite for mischief, and together they build a life for themselves on the streets of London. However, when Estella befriends fashion legend Baroness von Hellman, she embraces her wicked side to become the raucous and revenge-bent Cruella.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Meet ordinary people who have experienced the extraordinary power of prayer.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Andy's attempt to sell a grill that Jim gave him a few years ago results in a wildly destructive tug-of-war between the two.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: When Tim and Cindy Devlin crash Gracie's birthday party, they announce that they are getting divorced.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim finds Cheryl a gay friend that she can attend musicals with, so he can escape having to go himself.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim tries to sabotage the surprise 50th birthday party Cheryl plans for him.
